# When agents get stuck

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd section "Agent mode errors" +
     06-general-prompting-advice.qmd context-poisoning material +
     05-github-copilot.qmd tip about GC getting "stuck in a loop" -->

Recognising loops, PATH/Rscript errors, and context poisoning — and when to just restart the chat.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge deliberately poisoning a chat's context, then recovering by restarting.
:::
